title: phacelia mutabilis var. frigida
intro: Phacelia mutabilis var. frigida, also known as Desert Phacelia or Frigid Phacelia, is a rare and flowering plant species that belongs to the borage family. The medicinal properties of Phacelia mutabilis var. frigida are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. This plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Phacelia mutabilis var. frigida can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and sought-after herbal remedy.
